programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger Mooking loves a great sandwich, and searches the country for the top 15 sandwiches.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas

programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: England's Vanished Crown Jewels
programme.desc: Josh goes on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the deadly marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels, which were swept away in a freak tidal surge in the 13th century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Tomb of the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt, where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery: the mummy of an ancient High Priest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Beyond The Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates traverses the US to uncover the mysteries of The Secret.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Josh and his Adventures Down Under
programme.desc: Josh searches Australia's infamous Shipwreck Coast for the missing Mahogany Ship. Then he goes on a journey through the Australian outback to find a field of gold. Afterwards, he investigates sightings of a supposedly extinct marsupial.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: Josh joins leading archeologists as they investigate America's first missing-persons case, the lost colony of Roanoke. Following newly discovered clues, he'll reach new heights as he digs for answers to this over 400-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: From an imposing Czech castle said to protect a portal to hell to a lavish feast prepared for 3,000 hungry primates in Thailand, Josh explores five legendary locations where appearances can be deceiving.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Earth Home
programme.desc: A young couple sets out to build their dream home together in a remote canyon just north of Yellowstone National Park in Montana. They create a timeless, earthen home suited for their challenging climate.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Top Ten: Most Hair-Raising Moments

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Jay experiments with cars and water. He and comedian Jeff Dunham race the fastest amphibious cars on the market, then Jay hits the high seas in a Navy hovercraft. He'll also fight fire with a vintage steam truck, and tries a drunk driving simulation suit.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Unsung Heroes
programme.desc: Jay introduces the real heroes of the automotive world, on and off screen. Martha Stewart shows off Edsel Son of Henry Ford's Maine estate. Jay tries to learn the jobs of a NASCAR pit crew and does a pit stop for Joey Logano during an actual race.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Hand Made
programme.desc: Jay explores the dying art of handmade automobile design. He visits the retro Old Crow Speed Shop and takes a vintage belly tank racer onto a dry lake bed.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Pitches include an undershirt that prevents embarrassing sweat stains. The rarest and most valuable spice in the world can empower farmers in a war-torn country.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sitting Bull/ The Spies Who Loved Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club. Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown, but her grandparents think it's too dangerous.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sister Act/ House Flip
programme.desc: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other. After causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Loud House: Feast or Family/ A Dark and Story Night
programme.desc: When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids. When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: Coach Kreeton teaches ping pong, the kids get trapped in a never-ending tik tok dance, and Tammy is interviewed on live television.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Chasing That Dream
programme.desc: Dylan has trouble adjusting to the Wilson family's rules, leading to confrontation with his uncle that makes him feel unwanted.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's New Brain
programme.desc: A soap opera diva becomes romantically involved with Joey; Rachel and Phoebe compete.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Truth About London
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly recall how their relationship changed during the London trip.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Monica has to fight a fellow bride-to-be for a unique wedding dress.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Award
programme.desc: Joey is happy to be nominated for a 'Soapie,' the third most prestigious daytime TV award.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin
programme.desc: The arrival of Ross and Monica's cousin causes serious distractions for all the men.

programme.title: Mom: Nazi Zombies and a Two-Hundred Pound Baby
programme.desc: Bonnie tries to get Christy to admit she still has feelings for her ex-husband, Baxter.

programme.title: Mom: Cornflakes and the Hair of Three Men
programme.desc: When the restaurant closes for renovations, Christy takes a job as Jill's personal assistant. Also, Bonnie answers a wrong number and falls for the guy on the other end of the line.

programme.title: Mom: Caperberries and a Glass Eye
programme.desc: Christy encourages Bonnie to go out with a great new guy, only to find out he's not as great as they thought.

programme.title: Mom: Beast Mode and Old People Kissing
programme.desc: When Jodi's boyfriend, Travis, who was with her when she overdosed, shows up at an A.A. meeting, Christy struggles to show him the compassion he needs. Also, Bonnie's new boyfriend, Adam, feels left out because she spends so much time at A.A.

programme.title: George Lopez: Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Still furious about her break up with Randy, Benny takes a golf club to her boss' car.

programme.title: George Lopez: What George Doesn't Noah
programme.desc: Carmen's friend Noah helps her keep her relationship with Zack hidden from her parents.

programme.title: George Lopez: Now George Noah's Ex-Zackly What Happened
programme.desc: George and Angie forbid Carmen and Zack's relationship, which may push Carmen away.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Searches for a Needle in a Haight-Stack
programme.desc: When Carmen leaves home after an argument, George and Angie's dad set out to look for her.

programme.title: George Lopez: Landlord Almighty
programme.desc: When Carmen grows tired of the house rules and remodels her room without her parents' consent, George grants her request for independence by charging her living expenses.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Show
programme.desc: A widowed father with three girls gets help parenting from his brother-in-law and friend.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Night
programme.desc: Danny is angry when he leaves the girls with Jesse and finds out that they stayed up late.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece/ Whelk Attack
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab. Giant sea whelks terrorize the folks of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Doorman of the City/ Fendrich in the Wild
programme.desc: A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Game On!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob Meets the Strangler/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob turns in the littering Tattletale Strangler; SpongeBob and Patrick invest in a local prank shop's magic 'invisible spray'.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Cool Hand Wowski/ Big Bern
programme.desc: After Ollie and Captain Wowski have a spat, CW is mistaken for a stray cat and gets captured by Animal Control. Preparing to meet a bully after school, Bernie finds a monster device in CW's closet that can help him.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Ollie Dogs/ Camp Magna
programme.desc: Ollie offers a monster realm condiment for his hot dog stand, accidentally causing weird side effects. Ollie and his classmates go on a camping trip. Ollie uses the pack to avoid roughing it, attracting Andre and Bev.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob

programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Handemonium/ Breakin'
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his first break.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy IV/ Doing Time
programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are eating when Mermaid Man accidentally drops his belt.

programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Getting Oldie With It/ Lil' Baby Ollie
programme.desc: After Ollie, Cleo and Bernie use an age-up monster to get into the movies, Bernie experiences the joys of being old. Later, Ollie impresses the coolest kids in school but now he's got to watch a scary movie featuring his biggest fear, geese.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date

programme.title: Hoarders: Fuzzie and Fredd
programme.desc: Fuzzie's father works 10-hour days to support Fuzzie and Fredd, but now he's fed up and giving them an ultimatum to clean up or get cut off.

programme.title: Hoarders: Glen/ Lisa
programme.desc: Twenty-five-hundred free-roaming rats have hoarded Glen out of his home and into a shed on his property. More than 30 cats roam freely through Lisa's cluttered home and she is threatened with eviction.

programme.title: Hoarders: BG and Lee/ Chris
programme.desc: BG and Lee have filled their million-dollar Victorian home with hoards of stuff. Chris has filled his house and eight storage units with worthless junk that he gets for free.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ben and Robin and Kevin
programme.desc: Ailing couple, Ben and Robins's hoarding is so severe that EMT's can no longer access their home for emergencies. Kevin is hiding a hoard of sexual paraphernalia in his home from his family by living in a hotel.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo
programme.desc: In Thailand, a group of Christian aid workers recruit John Rambo to guide them up the Salween River to deliver medical supplies to the Karen tribe of neighbouring Burma (aka Myanmar).

programme.title: Movie: Escape Plan
programme.desc: An expert at escaping from prison is betrayed and locked in the most secret and secure facility ever built. He and another inmate must work together to get out this time.

programme.title: The First 48: The Passenger/ Death Call
programme.desc: When a Tulsa man is gunned down at the wheel of his car, detectives turn to a passenger who saw it all. A 20-year-old man in New Orleans is shot down minutes after his mother gets a warning about the murder.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Crazy concoctions from the minds of the guys that were too hot for TV.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Taunted House

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Dream Crusher

programme.title: Fameless: The Hammer

programme.title: Fameless: Close Encounters
programme.desc: A stakeout for illegal aliens turns otherworldly, a jokester's prank has an unintended reaction, and when a style queen patrols for crimes of fashion, it's what she's wearing that lands her on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Fameless: Mayan Ruined

programme.title: Southern Charm: All Talk No Action
programme.desc: Kathryn takes the high road by inviting Thomas' new girlfriend, Ashley, to lunch. Meanwhile, as Cameran's due date approaches, her anxieties over becoming a mom subside.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Pulp Friction
programme.desc: As Thomas ponders his next steps with Ashley, Patricia encourages him to propose. Austen's parents push him to make some strides professionally, while Craig hires a coach to help him get his life on track.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Exes on the Half Shell
programme.desc: Naomie prepares to open her family's new restaurant and finally comes to terms with the fact that she isn't over Craig. Meanwhile, Patricia and Craig have a heart-to-heart about relationships.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Kat's Got Your Tongue
programme.desc: Cameran suspects that she may be experiencing labor pains. Kathryn prepares for her first day of work, while Craig helps Austen realize things are over with Chelsea and refocuses on wooing Victoria. Patricia tries to make Ashley into a Southern Belle.

programme.title: Southern Charm: What Da Fuskie
programme.desc: Cameran plays the pregnancy waiting game while the rest of the gang prepares for a trip to Shep and Chelsea's hometown, Hilton Head. Meanwhile, feuding exes, Craig and Naomie, attempt to act civil with the help of an old furry friend.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Hilton Head-Ache
programme.desc: Emotions run high during the gang's first night in Hilton Head, when Ashley confronts Kathryn and everyone is forced to choose sides. When the last flare up comes, it's Austen who gets burned when a flirtation with Chelsea comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Family Ties
programme.desc: As the Hilton Head trip comes to an end, Shep visits his mom and finally admits some truths about himself, as Chelsea takes a trip down memory lane and opens up about her past. Meanwhile, Cameran finally welcomes her new bundle of joy.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Beer and Trembling
programme.desc: Austen prepares to debut his beer to his family and friends and Craig makes progress on his pillows for Patricia. Cameran tries to adjust to her new life with baby Palmer, while Kathryn and Shep spend some quality time together.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Gone Girl
programme.desc: After basking in the glory of his successful beer event, Austen is hit with romantic reality and Craig faces some harsh truths. Meanwhile, as Thomas and Ashley struggle to resolve their issues, Chelsea feels vindicated when she hears some news from Shep.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Game Changer
programme.desc: Thomas continues to pressure Ashley to get a job in Charleston, leaving them in relationship limbo. Meanwhile, Chelsea and Austen come to terms with the state of their friendship, while Craig and Naomie, once again, try to navigate dating post break-up.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Ho, Ho, Ho
programme.desc: After five years of constant tension, Patricia finally extends an olive branch and invites Kathryn to her winter ball. As these two enemies make peace, the delicate truce between Craig and Naomie blows up when he brings a date to the ball.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase
programme.desc: When Chase scores an internship at a local television station, he is forced to deal with some difficult talent, Todd Chrisley. And, looking for a new hobby, Faye and Julie learn Italian.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye
programme.desc: Todd discovers that Faye has injured her foot on yet another gambling adventure and insists she recover at his house. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie push a reluctant Grayson to take up a hobby.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On
programme.desc: In an effort to cheer up Grayson, Savannah organizes a farewell weekend for Grayson and friends. Meanwhile, Chase teams up with BFF Parker for an unexpected get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: As the Chrisley's settle into their new Nashville home, Todd begins to encroach upon Savannah's independence. Meanwhile, Grayson takes up wrestling and challenges Chase to a match.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator
programme.desc: The family prepares for the Grand Opening of their newly purchased juice bar, but Chase can't take the job seriously. Back at the house, Faye tries to collect on a bet she made with Grayson.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase in Charge
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head to LA for Julie's liposuction procedure, leaving Chase in charge. But when Chase abuses his newfound authority, Todd must return home early to put a stop to Chase's antics.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Todd takes the juice bar employees on a teambuilding excursion, Savannah and Chase get into a disagreement. And when Faye has a health scare, the Chrisley's are forced to come together.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Goat Farm Yourself
programme.desc: Todd sends Chase and Savannah to a goat farm to learn the value of hard work. But things go array when the siblings let their petty bickering get in the way.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Goes Country
programme.desc: While Todd works on a special song for Julie's birthday, he tricks her into planning her own surprise party. But when Julie threatens to cancel Todd's is forced to ask Savannah for help.

programme.title: Movie: The Notebook
programme.desc: A man tells the story of a woman who is torn between her fiancé and her first love.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Redemption Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: Four chefs who have been defeated in the Flavortown market before are back for redemption.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Redemption Tournament: Finale
programme.desc: The final four chefs vie for the ultimate comeback.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Eats
programme.desc: Guy's got his sights set on food with international influence. In Richardson, Texas, a Lebanese joint stacks a tall shawarma, while in Vegas, a burger spot adds an Asian twist. And in New York, a pita is done the Druze way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Duos
programme.desc: In New York's Lower East Side, Guy is pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings to pig ears.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Poutine, Pizza and Pork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Down-Home Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into some down-home cooking. In Garland, Utah, a century-old staple servin' up savory sandwiches and a legendary sweet treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Go-to Joints
programme.desc: Guy checks out some beloved local places.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits classic burger and hot dog joints including: a Baltimore spot for Coney dogs from an 80 year old recipe; an Austin, TX, eatery known for Serrano peppers and hot buffalo sauce burgers; and a Minneapolis dog and burger dive.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seaside Eats
programme.desc: Menu includes: fried clams; crab cakes; lobster chow mein.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Succulent Sandwiches
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into succulent sandwiches! In Oakland, a real-deal butchery stacking up killer cheesesteak and off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Porktastic
programme.desc: Smoked tasso and Southwest Louisiana boudin sausage; Napoletana pizza place in TX.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tri-Continent Cuisine
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out killer cuisine spanning three different continents. In Denver, a unique quick service spot dishes out a creative take on Indian curry. Then in northwest Denver, a Brazilian bistro cooks up the bomb croquettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Breakfast
programme.desc: Guy searches out some of America's greatest breakfasts. He indulges in a variety of pancakes, hash as well as omelettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Buzz-Worthy Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is cooking a "buzz"-worthy brunch with the one ingredient he can't live without: honey! He highlights honey's versatility with grilled stone fruit with farmer's cheese and spiced honey almonds, and chocolate chip pistachio pancakes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Best in Class
programme.desc: Ina's sharing best in class dishes with the volume turned right up.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: When Life Gives You Lemons... Rejoice!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli goes to a lemon farm in search of different varieties of lemon trees with her friend, actress Melissa Peterman. Then, she puts her favorite ingredient into a menu that is fun from soup to nuts, to lemons!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Chicken
programme.desc: It's all about chicken as Ree Drummond whips up four speedy 16-minute meals. First, her Buffalo chicken burgers are perfect when time is short and hungry teenagers are waiting.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy Cookie Swap
programme.desc: Ree Drummond gets ready for a cookie swap where there's no actual swapping, just four awesome cowboys swinging by to fill up their cookie plates with festive treats! There will be cinnamon roll cookies, red velvet crinkle cookies, and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding Now, Feeding Later
programme.desc: Ree makes spicy stewed beef, pimento cheese and bacon grits, roasted broccoli salad and a sour cream and parsley dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 5
programme.desc: Ree shares some great fast recipes at home on the ranch while the kids shoot the show, and her youngest, Todd, joins the crew. Ree makes an easy mashup of broccoli cheddar orzotto and super-speedy Italian meatball skewers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Must Eat Sugar, Molly's Fave Desserts
programme.desc: Molly is sharing some of her all-time best dessert recipes...from cookies to squares and definitely donuts in between. Duh!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: It's Cat-urday
programme.desc: Valerie is moving about as fast as her cats this morning, but she still wants to set herself up for success in the week ahead, so she's prepping a few make-ahead dishes.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: 'Too Cute' Brunch
programme.desc: Kardea invites her Aunt TC over for a big low-country brunch. The perfectly Southern meal includes Charleston-style shrimp and grits, homemade buttermilk biscuits topped with fresh apricot jam.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Wine and Dine
programme.desc: Inspired by the bounty produced in nearby Sonoma and Napa counties, Guy Fieri asks his chef friends to make a meal with local wine as the star.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Fan Feedback
programme.desc: The Kitchen is taking requests with all viewer-inspired recipes. Katie Lee is using the most asked about ingredient with her any bean burgers. Sunny takes on a pantry staple three ways to top honey glazed salmon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Back to the Beginning
programme.desc: Get ready to open the vault for the hour that started it all, the very first Triple-D episode ever. Only this time, it's reloaded with plenty of extras from Guy himself, about his original trip through Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Incredible Italian
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's eatin' up all kinds of incredible Italian. From Boston to San Francisco, Ohio to Omaha, plates are piled with favorites like pasta, polenta, piccata and pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Primetime Pork
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's piling plates with all kinds of pork, all over the nation.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Damn Stalker

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Merely Slept With a Commie
programme.desc: When Evelyn expresses sympathy for a friend who had no mourners at her funeral, Alan and Charlie inform her that she's headed for the same fate. Instead of taking their comments as a motive to change, she cunningly makes them regret what they said.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville
programme.desc: When Jake starts covering his walls with posters of sexy women, Alan feels pressure to make the most of what little childhood his son has left. Meanwhile, Kandi embarks on a new career as an actress.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smooth as a Ken Doll
programme.desc: As Judith and Herb's wedding nears, Charlie gets a bit too close to Herb's witty sister.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aunt Myra Doesn't Pee a Lot
programme.desc: Alan prepares Jake for Judith's wedding, while Charlie continues his fling with Herb's sister Myra.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tucked, Taped and Gorgeous
programme.desc: Alan befriends Greg, a gay single dad, causing Alan and Charlie to re-examine their own sexual identities. Meanwhile, Jake has a crush on Greg's daughter, Sophie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. McGlue's Feedbag
programme.desc: Jake comes into a windfall when Charlie takes him to the track, and Alan is stuck in that special hell known as the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Anteaters. They're Just Crazy-Lookin
programme.desc: Charlie loses a girl to a young, handsome handyman who is doing repairs at his house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Prostitutes and Gelato
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan must confront their 'daddy issues' when Evelyn's new boyfriend invites them to Las Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Media Room Slash Dungeon
programme.desc: Charlie reacts oddly after an evening with his mother, and Alan's date reacts oddly after having sex with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo
programme.desc: Suffering from 'bimbo fatigue,' Charlie lets Alan set him up with a woman his own age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.desc: Christine becomes envious as Richard and New Christine plan for their new baby and decides to ask Richard for his help so she can have one too.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Subway, Somehow

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Up in the Airport

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Revenge Makeover

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play
programme.desc: Miles introduces Rose to his daughter Caroline; Blanche rents a Mercedes to attract men.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Flu Attack (aka The Flu)
programme.desc: A week before an awards ceremony, Blanche, Dorothy and Rose each come down with a nasty flu, which compounds their arguing over who will win a prestigious award.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.desc: Barn Sanctuary welcomes a blind goat called Charlie and two lovable ducklings who need help to learn how to swim. A tussle between pigs June and Jasper ensues during routine tusk and nail trimming, while Ginger the goat embraces her new prosthetics.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Crime of the Century
programme.desc: Sergeant Simmons and the team search for the suspect of a heinous deer poaching case.

programme.title: Roar: The Most Dangerous Movie Ever Made
programme.desc: Get an inside look at a film that put actors dangerously close to some big cats.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A Smartphone with video evidence of a crime leads to a poacher. Two drunken sledders run over a warden and are chased through the woods. Herring hunts down a man that he knows with arrest warrants. LaFlamme helps a herd of deer in distress.

programme.title: North Woods Law: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The entire warden service pulls together for a massive search effort for a missing boy. A second search for a lost hiker stretches the wardens to their limit. A pair of salmon poachers are caught in the act and a new K-9 is trained.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cheaters
programme.desc: A notorious gang of poachers are up to their old tricks. Also, the wardens stop some suspects from fleeing the state and the forensic team investigates who shot at a woman in her backyard.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Take the Plunge
programme.desc: Spring arrives and things start plunging through the ice. The wardens investigate a case of injured bald eagles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett investigate a man raising alligators in the attic of his home. As night falls over the White Mountains, Officers Glenn Lucas and Eric Fluette ascend into the darkness to rescue a lost group of hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Room for Error
programme.desc: Officer Lopashanski makes a surprising discovery while searching an island for an injured bald eagle. Officers Cheney and Pushee stumble upon a trespasser whose vehicle is stuck in a mud hole. Officer MacFadzen leads the search for a missing swimmer.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: Movie: Roll Bounce
programme.desc: When the local skating rink goes out of business, X and his friends are forced to go to the Sweetwater Roller Rink. There, they find that they are not as talented as they thought and have difficulty keeping up with the trick skaters at the new rink.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks
programme.desc: A couple, desperate to have a baby, hires a surrogate mother. After taking her into their home, they discover she has a dangerous obsession with the husband. They are caught in her deadly game, and have to fight for their lives and their future.

programme.desc: Kim is up for a job with a prestigious fashion designer, but she has some competition.

programme.title: The Parkers: She's a Bad Mamma Jamma
programme.desc: The son of Prof. Oglevee's widowed friend decides he wants Nikki to be his new mom.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Good, the Bad and the Funny

programme.desc: A space ship, carrying thousands of passengers, is on a 120-year journey to a new colony planet. After a malfunction, two passengers are woken up 90 years too early. When the malfunction spreads, they have to save the ship and the other passengers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There's No Disgrace Like Home
programme.desc: After seeing how dysfunctional his family is at a company picnic, Homer enrols them all in therapy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsoncalifragilisticexpiala(D'Oh)cious
programme.desc: When Marge starts showing signs of high stress and overwork, Homer interviews nannies. No one seems to be qualified until Shary Bobbins arrives, and everyone quickly grows dependent on her and her songs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: When Homer takes Marge out to a nightclub, a hypnotist places him under a spell.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yokel Chords
programme.desc: When Lisa protests denying education to Cletus's children, Principal Skinner offers her a chance to tutor the kids herself. Lisa's plans to help are diverted when Krusty spots the kids during their field trip and decides to use them as a musical act.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: When Homer inadvertently humiliates Bart in front of a stadium crowd, Marge encourages Homer to enroll in a fathering enrichment class taught by therapist Dr. Zander.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Specs and the City
programme.desc: Mr. Burns gives high-tech eyeglasses to all of his employees in order to spy on them. Homer loves the enhanced reality of his new gadget, that is, until Marge tries them on and he finds out she's seeing a marriage counsellor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Diggs
programme.desc: Bart is rescued from a confrontation with Springfield Elementary's bullies by Diggs, a recent transfer student and aspiring champion in the niche sport of falconry. But, Bart soon discovers that Diggs wants to do more than just wrangle falcons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Cad and the Hat
programme.desc: When Bart betrays Lisa, he has to deal with his guilt literally. Meanwhile, Springfield is in awe when Homer is revealed to be a chess savant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Want You (She's So Heavy)
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa attempts to fix her parents' strained relationship by seeking advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Savannah
programme.desc: East Africa is a land that is constantly changing. In order to survive, creatures must be able to deal with twists and turns, no matter how hostile and unpredictable. This unique and varied land is a haven for life.

programme.title: Africa: Congo
programme.desc: The Congo rainforest covers the very heart of Africa and is a dynamic and pulsating habitat, packed with life. From the competitive centre of the forest to the open edge of the Atlantic Ocena, this is all about carving out space in a crowded world.

programme.title: Africa: Cape
programme.desc: Two great ocean currents, one cold and one warm, sweep around the continent's Great Cape.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest

programme.desc: A satanic symbol points to an army of the dead in Siberia. A massive stone giant's in a remote desert. Evidence of a Russian doomsday device is right on America's doorstep. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Feud on the Frontier
programme.desc: Two neighboring frontiersmen get along great until one's dog frightens the other's daughter and grandson. It's soon all out war that will leave one of them shot dead and the other in a white knuckle standoff with police.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Murder, Interrupted
programme.desc: A Texas family's world is upended when a gunman strikes and a massive plot more than two years and three million dollars in the making is revealed.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Gypsy Blanchard always had the support of her mother and her best friend DeeDee while trying to cope with her chronic illnesses. After one of them winds up dead, both Gypsy and the community are left in shock. The police struggle to solve the crime.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Murder In Paradise
programme.desc: In 1990, a woman is fatally shot inside her cabin in Sierra Mountains of California. As police begin to unravel the mystery, the unsettling truth about the killer comes to light.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Murder On the Run
programme.desc: Detective Derek Mois, a veteran with Omaha Police Department, responds to a horrific double homicide involving an eleven year old boy and the family's housekeeper. As police work to find answers, the killer targets his next victims.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Home Sweet Murder
programme.desc: In a nightmare scenario, Leo Fisher and Sue Duncan are held hostage as a man claiming to be connected to the government tries to extract information out of them.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Murder Beyond the Grave
programme.desc: The small town of Kankakee, Illinois is rocked by a kidnapping and ransom scheme that targets one of the town's most well-known citizens.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Murder, Interrupted
programme.desc: A Texas family's world is upended when a gunman strikes and a massive plot more than two years and three million dollars in the making is revealed.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Gypsy Blanchard always had the support of her mother and her best friend DeeDee while trying to cope with her chronic illnesses. After one of them winds up dead, both Gypsy and the community are left in shock. The police struggle to solve the crime.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Daughter Disappears
programme.desc: When 16 year old Skylar Neese vanishes overnight, her parents, Mary and Dave, are instantly sucked into a mysterious world of chaos, rumor and innuendo. But, only after a heart-rending 6 months, does the unimaginable and violent truth finally emerge.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Mormon Mom's Mission
programme.desc: Utah mom Jennifer is sent on a journey of despair and discovery in the aftermath of her sister-in-law's mysterious disappearance. Suspicion soon falls on the person Jennifer least expects - her own brother - and it's left to her to unearth the truth.

programme.title: Sinister Ministers: Collared: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Like a wolf in sheep's clothing, a preacher with a blood lust tricks a small community into letting him be their pastor. Then a cross- dressing priest earns the title 'Monsignor Meth' when he takes on a different kind of calling.

programme.title: Sinister Ministers: Collared: Sacrament of Evil
programme.desc: A priest who is suspected of sexually abusing teenage boys stops at nothing to cover his tracks. Then an illicit passionate affair between two pastors meets a bloody end.

programme.title: Sinister Ministers: Collared: Lambs to the Slaughter
programme.desc: A pastor from Baltimore is so consumed by greed that he is prepared to kill for profit. Then Jimmy Swaggart, a tele-evangelist has the most famous sex scandal of the 1980s when he is caught with a hooker in a seedy motel.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Ring
programme.desc: In 1987, Pat Postiglione is tasked with solving his first homicide: a young mother strangled to death inside her apartment. Without any viable suspects, Pat faces the daunting task of interviewing his only witness: the victim's 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Her husband is devastated and detectives have few clues to work with... until chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Christie Wilson disappears after a night at the local casino, surveillance cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this video footage unlock the secrets of what happened next and help bring her home alive?

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Capital of Deception
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas where Mobsters once ruled and casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. Find out why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for the Atomic Bomb, and a meeting place for terrorists.

programme.title: Hidden History of the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The amazing, untold story of how President Lincoln initiated a series of events that culminated in the moon landing.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Capital of Deception
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas where Mobsters once ruled and casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. Find out why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for the Atomic Bomb, and a meeting place for terrorists.

programme.title: Hidden History of the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The amazing, untold story of how President Lincoln initiated a series of events that culminated in the moon landing.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.desc: Chris and his team descend on Blog Cabin 2016 to turn an empty side yard into a recreational destination complete with a stilted guest retreat, two-tiered deck with custom lounge chairs and a sand volleyball court.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2003 and reinvents the cake that so many folks complained about way back when. This time, the cake isn't just good: it's golden.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: I Pie: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this episode on lemon meringue pie with a new crust, a new filling and a new meringue. He also bites the heads off of some puppets.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Izard Vs. Blamey
programme.desc: It's the Chairman's special grill battle, and New York burger master, Chef Victoria Blamey, has a beef with Iron Chef Stephanie Izard.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces Vs. Liken
programme.desc: Chef Kelly Liken takes on the newest Iron Chef in her first entry to Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Hughes
programme.desc: Chuck Hughes enters into battle at Kitchen Stadium in a network vs. network cook-off.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Anderson
programme.desc: Richmond, Virginia's schnitzel queen, Chef Brittanny Anderson, hopes that she doesn't leave Kitchen Stadium feeling blue after battling one of the Chairman's best, Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Fire Masters: No Grits no Glory
programme.desc: In the Wildfire Round, the chefs try not to crack under pressure. It’s fight or flight in the Crossfire Round, and in the Feast of Fire, the judges are treated to some Southern hospitality.
