programme.title: Unique Eats: Southern Favorites
programme.desc: Highlighting some of the most unique takes on southern home cooking.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Burgers
programme.desc: Come see what's between the buns at these burger joints that are taking the American classic to the next level. Whether it's with foie gras in Philly, pimento cheese in Atlanta, umami in Los Angeles or truffles in New York.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ice Cream
programme.desc: If you like ice cream, you will be wowed by these unique treats. How about bourbon and corn flakes flavoured scoops at Humphry Slocombe? Or the sweets at Sweet Rose Creamery where everything from the cones to the chocolate chips are made from scratch.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Crazy Delicious Doughnuts
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., there's a place that specializes in grown up versions that feature bold glazes and boozy fillings.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: Seattle these days has a reputation for sublime sweet treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Southern Sweets in Atlanta
programme.desc: Southern desserts are in a category all to their own combining big bold flavours with deep tradition.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Madeline
programme.desc: The bravest little redhead is coming from Paris to Cake Wars! Four amazing cake artists battle to have their cake at the center of a party celebrating Madeline, but only one will journey home with $10,000!

programme.title: Cake Wars: Jelly Belly
programme.desc: It's the most colorful and flavor-filled Cake Wars battle ever, as four incredible bakers battle it out to have their cake creation as the centerpiece of a party celebrating Jelly Belly!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston
programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phuket
programme.desc: Andrew explores the alluring eats of Phuket, Thailand, an island paradise with bountiful natural gifts, aromatic flavors and multicultural cuisine. From spicy crab curry to sweet, crispy street snacks, Phuket's gastronomy is a feast for the senses.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: St. Louis
programme.desc: As the Gateway to the West, St. Louis has built a reputation for homegrown goodness on the backs of its hard-working people. Andrew Zimmern explores such edible icons as St. Louis-style BBQ, toasted ravioli and gooey butter cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.desc: Learn how experiences shape the brain and body together, allowing them to adapt to the outside environment and develop new skills. Plus, learn how the brain forms memories by storing and processing billions of pieces of information every second.

programme.title: Shakespeare Uncovered: Measure for Measure With Romola Garai
programme.desc: Romola Garai explores 'Measure for Measure,' one of Shakespeare’s most provocative plays that presents a surprisingly timely drama of sexual morality, hypocrisy and harassment.

programme.title: Civilizations: Renaissances
programme.desc: Travel east and west to explore the connections and rivalries between Renaissance Italy and the Islamic empires that experienced their own cultural flowering in the 15th and 16th centuries. Both spheres were open to influences flowing both ways.

programme.title: The Roosevelts: An Intimate History: A Strong and Active Faith (1944-1962)
programme.desc: Frail and failing but determined to see the war through to victory, FDR wins re-election but a cerebral hemorrhage kills him. Eleanor proves herself a shrewd politician and a skilled negotiator in her own right and a champion of civil rights.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Missing
programme.desc: The SVU pursues a suspect when a child is discovered in the trunk of an abandoned car.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Blackout
programme.desc: When a defense attorney is raped after a police charity event, Benson reluctantly looks to her own for a suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Exchange
programme.desc: Benson helps a teenaged exchange student after she's assaulted by a cab driver.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Diss
programme.desc: When a pop star is assaulted in her home, SVU investigates the public feud between her rapper husband and a competing recording artist. Finn's family tie to a suspect takes him off a case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assumptions
programme.desc: The SVU searches for two suspects spotted fleeing the scene after a Muslim woman is assaulted inside a synagogue. Meanwhile, Benson is dismayed to find Rob Miller is out on bail.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: End Game
programme.desc: When a teenager is found dead in the Hudson River, Lt. Benson suspects Rob Miller is behind the mysterious death but can’t prove it.

programme.title: Modern Family: Travels With Scout
programme.desc: Claire is caught off guard when Phil's father shows up in an RV with a little four-legged friend. Cameron offers to fill in as a drummer for Dylan's band, and Jay and Gloria suffer the consequences when they take Manny to a traumatizing horror movie.

programme.title: Modern Family: Airport 2010
programme.desc: For Jay's birthday, Gloria gives him the best surprise: a romantic getaway to Hawaii. The only kicker is she invited the entire family to come along. Everyone arrives at the airport, and it's quite a scene, filled with forgotten IDs and flying phobias.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hawaii
programme.desc: A relaxing family vacation in Hawaii gets slightly derailed when everyone has their own idea of fun.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Wagon
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old station wagon, but not before everyone takes it on one last ride down memory lane. Meanwhile, when Mitchell decides to build a life-sized princess castle for Lily, Cameron calls in Jay for support.

programme.title: Modern Family: Earthquake
programme.desc: An earthquake hits, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny experiences an existential crisis while out with Jay, while Mitchell and Cameron use the quake as a way to get out of a brunch party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween
programme.desc: Claire loves Halloween and is gearing up to make the Dunphy house spooky for the trick-or-treaters. She gives each family member a role to play, but none of it goes quite right.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Zero Tolerance
programme.desc: Benson and Stone take drastic measures to reunite a young girl rescued from a sex trafficker with her mother. Rollins gives her rocky relationship another chance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Accredo
programme.desc: A member of a women's empowerment group is found murdered, leading the cops to the group's charismatic male leader. Rollins keeps her pregnancy under wraps to avoid going on desk duty.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Exile
programme.desc: A young woman wakes up in the hospital with no memory of her assault and Carisi's investigation dissolves when she disappears.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mea Culpa
programme.desc: Stone takes his own case to trial when a woman from his past accuses him of sexual assault.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Good, the Bad and the Dominatrix
programme.desc: Sara's uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSI's investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Spiral
programme.desc: While Callen is undercover in the mail room of an office building to investigate an arms dealer, it is taken over by terrorists and Callen becomes a hostage. When the team arrives to help, they discover the entire building is wired with explosives.

programme.title: NCIS: Enemy on the Hill
programme.desc: The NCIS team searches for the person and motive behind a contract killer targeting a Navy Lieutenant Commander. Meanwhile, Abby uncovers new information about her family after undergoing tests for kidney donation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark
programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sofia Pernas, Tiya Sircar, Chef Sheldon Simeon and Renee Nickel visit.

programme.title: Movie: Puppy Love
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter take in a lost dog and give him a home. The dog turns out to belong to a baseball player, who works out a shared custody since the girl has fallen in love with the dog.

programme.title: Movie: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: A woman changes her personality according to a dating guide book to find a husband, but realizes the man she wants is the one who loves her for who she is.

programme.title: Movie: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her wish. She has a glimpse into her future which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park and Making da Band
programme.desc: Dave takes a closer look at the Diddy-driven show 'Making da Band'; musical guest Snoop Dogg and appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady and Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Crackhead Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on Fear Factor; special guests Joe Rogan, Nick Cannon, and Wayne Brady.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract and True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Dave introduces The Love Contract and True Hollywood Stories featuring Rick James.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy and Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: Dave Chappelle plays America's most vicious blind white supremacist.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon and Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how some events would have been played out if the president was black.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You and the World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents The History Channel's coverage of great inner city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer and Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave runs for office and shows how much cooler everything would be in slow motion.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla and Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure 'Blackzilla;' musical guest The Roots.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus and the Niggar Family
programme.desc: Dave imagines a black Gallagher, Paul Mooney guest stars as Negrodamus and music by DMX.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations and NY Boobs
programme.desc: Dave awards women with great 'NY boobs' and predicts the chaos by reparations for slavery; musical guest Busta Rhymes.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World and Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines the TV show The Real World with an all black cast and only one white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Lost Episodes
programme.desc: After getting a big new contract, Dave Chappelle sets out to get revenge on all those who have wronged him. Meanwhile, everyone seems to be trying to charge Dave more money for everything now that he is rich.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped and It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: A girl who hates her breasts is shown the error of her ways.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Black Howard Dean and Stereotype Pixies
programme.desc: Acting as Howard Dean, Dave screams his way across the campaign trail before getting into a fight as Gary Coleman. Later Dave attempts to ignore the racial stereotype pixies that follow him everywhere he goes.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Show Business and Lil Jon in Love
programme.desc: Dave finally gets his chance to meet the great and powerful Show Business. Later, Dave introduces a group of monsters victimized by discrimination.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History and Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: Sketches include Great Moments in Hookup History, Ask a Black Dude and Fat Joe.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Kevin Nealon, Jimmy Kimmel and Paul Scheer
programme.desc: Terrence plans a gender reveal for DJ Khaled, Tim Heidecker and Eric Wareheim negotiate a "legally" fun time, and Heidi Gardner practices condescending philanthropy.

programme.title: South Park: Jared Has Aides

programme.title: South Park: Raisins

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.desc: The team must figure out if a hit-and-run on a recently released criminal is a murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Uncommon Valor
programme.desc: In Dallas, when a Good Samaritan is gunned down trying to protect his friends, detectives must unravel a tangled web of bad tips and lies in their hunt for the killer.

programme.title: The First 48: Easy Money/ Ambushed
programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: The First 48: Bad Reputation/ Deadly Party
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young mother of three is gunned down in front her home. In Broward County, Florida, a young man is shot at a birthday party, and detectives try to learn why a celebration turned deadly.

programme.title: The First 48: Nightmare in Greedy Grove/ Good Man Down
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting among teenage boys leaves an innocent bystander dead.

programme.title: The First 48: Killer Connection/ Bloody Birthday
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is shot dead outside a bar, and the killer is caught on video. Then, in Cleveland, a mother of six is gunned down on her birthday, leaving her family devastated.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Miami

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Gun
programme.desc: In Texas, a 17-year-old with a violent past is named the killer in a drug deal gone wrong - but a misidentified bullet could unravel the case.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Classified Ad For Crime
programme.desc: Two murders across the country send police into a multi-state manhunt, searching for one killer couple.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Gun

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Fearsome Foursome
programme.desc: Two sets of adventurists separately endure the jungles of Panama for ten days. A survivalist makes sandals out of vines to protect her and her partners' feet from the searing heat. Another survivalist uses a bug net for clothing.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Fur the Win
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Laura Zerra and Steven Hall are dropped onto a frigid, snow-covered tundra in Alaska, 300 miles from the Arctic Circle. They use furs and skins to keep themselves warm.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Don't Cave In
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A mom and National Guard vet teams up with a firefighter in the relentless Colombian jungle. Forced to huddle in bat-infested caves as violent storms sweep through, they struggle to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Snow Daze
programme.desc: In the frozen American Rockies, snow storms and freezing temperatures force the survivalists to make risky choices with their fire and food sources. An out of control blaze and toxic mushrooms put their challenge and safety at risk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: No Free Rides
programme.desc: Twelve survivalists take on a 40-day XL challenge in the ferocious, heat-stricken, deadly South African bush, a location so challenging ancient tribes would banish the weak. Now, these survivalists will do the same if someone isn't pulling their weight.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Man vs. Amazon
programme.desc: Two survivalists journey to the most hostile environment on the planet to take on the Amazon without modern conveniences or clothing. They attempt to survive while battling piranhas, jaguars, and mosquitoes.

programme.desc: In the frozen American Rockies, snow storms and freezing temperatures force the survivalists to make risky choices with their fire and food sources. An out of control blaze and toxic mushrooms put their challenge and safety at risk.

programme.title: Car Kings: Beau and the Bandit
programme.desc: The Galpin team takes inspiration from the past to build a super-advanced parts truck. This innovative build combines old-school parts and new-school technology with giant horsepower and a custom retro paint job for added flair.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Round and Around
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN invite all the 405 racers out to Willow Springs International Raceway for a road race competition. The racers have to pair up to compete in a time attack competition where the pair with the fastest combined times will take home $10,000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bring the Boys Back Home
programme.desc: Ready for another season of list racing, the 405 is hoping to put the past behind them, come together and make street racing fun again. But on race night, the same old games threaten to break them apart before they start.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Run Like Hell
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN head to Kansas to fish with the new and improved Gonorail. Back in Oklahoma, Ryan and Dominator repair broken cars in preparation for list racing, but when a driver gets out of control, the evening is brought to an abrupt end.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Time
programme.desc: Monza gets a chance to come for the list after his wreck, Shawn makes plans to get back into the top five, Farmtruck and AZN find a fun use for discarded airbags. Later, drivers make up for the lack of racing the previous week.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Shine On You Crazy Diamond
programme.desc: Ryan Martin looks over his car while Chief and Dave push each other in a competitive testing session, as they all get ready for another chance at number one. At race time, the racers fight to move up the list until broken cars slow everyone down.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Eyes on the Prize (Bristol 2019) Part 1
programme.desc: The racers will give it their all to win the $200 000 at the Bristol No Prep race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Don't Rain on My Parade (Bristol 2019) Part 2
programme.desc: Sixteen racer move in round two of the Bristol No Prep, but the racers must adjust their tunes for a trickier track after a rainfall.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Hard Way
programme.desc: Nearing the end of the list racing season, the racers make big decisions in a last ditch effort to movie up the list. On race night, untested cars mean big problems.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: With the last list race of the season, the racers get their cars ready while Farmtruck and AZN fish out some fancy cars at cruise night. On race night, a costly mistake threatens to derail Chief.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Another Brick in the Wall
programme.desc: OKC and Texas compete in an old school Cash Days race. Eight drivers from each state race for over $30,000 and the chance to prove that their state has the fastest racers in the country, but a sketchy road throws a wrench into the works for both sides.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Comfortably Numb
programme.desc: On the second night of Cash Days, 405 racers must match up and race, while still fighting to knock out the only remaining Texas driver. The sketchy road is still in play, and it becomes a tuner's game to see who can get down the street in one piece.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Crystal Clear
programme.desc: With Kristin trying to balance work and her family life, she finds herself still mourning her failed friendship with Kelly. She seeks advice from an astrologer that specializes in relationships to get insight about Kelly.

programme.title: Botched: Most Outrageous Rejects
programme.desc: Take a look at the top ten most outrageous rejects.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Trouble and a Chest Bubble
programme.desc: The Doctors travel to Iowa to see a young father whose infected chest implant is threatening his life. Later, they meet a pair of twins with matching cleft deformities who want to look more identical.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Crooked and Cracked
programme.desc: Paul and Terry take their surgical expertise to patients who have been botched by nature.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: The Chronicles of Hernia
programme.desc: Travel to Virginia to meet a young woman with severely deformed breasts. Later, a doctor becomes patient when a serious medical condition arises.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Boobs and Tubes
programme.desc: The doctors set out for Vegas to meet a young mother born with Pectus excavatum, and whose underlying breast issues are getting harder to deal with. In Chicago, they consult with a woman born pre-maturely with nasal complications as an adult.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Collapsed In and Busted Out
programme.desc: Doctors Dubrow and Nassif head to Arizona to help a woman whose nose collapsed into her own face. In NYC, they meet a college student with an extremely oversized breast, and later ride through Central Park checking up on the HBIC, Tiffany Pollard.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Lip Service
programme.desc: The doctors visit a young mother in Detroit suffering from Tubular Breast Deformation. Later, they consult with a woman in Atlanta whose tumor has left overgrown tissue in her mouth. Before leaving the ATL, they visit past patient Dwight Eubanks.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Kristin Bell is with us and she is getting real about her marriage, kids and life in quarantine.

programme.title: Botched: Muscles, Tucks and Forehead Flaps
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a patient who tried to treat her own skin cancer and ended up with a hole in her nose while Dr. Dubrow tackles a body builder's deflated breast.

programme.title: Botched: The Boob Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: A drag queen seeks Dr. Dubrow's expertise to rejuvenate his old breast implants (and career). Meanwhile, Dr. Nassif tackles a severe nose deformity, and later, the doctors meet a woman who wants to blow up her butt!

programme.title: Botched: Lumpy Lipo and Slippy Nippy
programme.desc: A woman with a 'side nipple' issue visits the doctors. A car accident leaves another woman's face disfigured. A previous patient comes back to the doctors, hoping to look more like a celebrity idol.

programme.title: Botched: Nothing Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A young woman visits the doctors and multiple silicone removal surgeries have left her with a distorted derriere, while a leggy painter needs her nose fixed to help lift her mother's guilty conscience.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: As Michael Jordan's fame peaked to unparalleled levels in the early 1990s in the wake of consecutive NBA titles and a starring role on the Olympic 'Dream Team', he became a profoundly significant cultural figure.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: With Michael Jordan's extraordinary fame came extraordinary scrutiny, and in 1993, it all felt like it came to a head with the Chicago Bulls' pursuit of a third straight title shadowed by question marks about Jordan's gambling.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: As Michael Jordan pushes his teammates hard for a sixth NBA title, his intensity and hunger for basketball dominance is in stark contrast to his mindset in October 1993, when he stunned the world by walking away from the game.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Michael Jordan would famously use even the smallest slight imaginable to motivate himself against an opponent. And when his NBA comeback in 1995 fell short in the playoffs, he worked harder than ever to return to form.

programme.title: The Last Dance

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Wild Justice
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a family fishing get educated, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: When Deer Attack
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande in search of an unidentified body. Warden Powell investigates an unusual deer case. Wardens Boone and Ataya respond to a call about mountain lions being shot in a woman's backyard.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Poachers and Liars
programme.desc: Game warden Johnson joins his local police department on a search warrant at the home of a well-known poacher. Warden Boone relocates an alligator snapping turtle. Wardens Benoit and Satchfield pull over a crabber and find marijuana in his car.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Mighty Mountain Puppies
programme.desc: Two Bernese mountain dog pups bond with their barnyard neighbours; a trio of Shiba Inu girls challenge their spick-and-span mom with their messy ways; in a litter of mixed breed Chatham Hill retrievers, a pup takes after his boisterous dad.

programme.title: Dogs 101: All the Presidents' Pets
programme.desc: Meet Bo, President Obama's puppy and What led President Obama to choose a Portuguese water dog. Also meet a menagerie of 'First Dogs' who all share a special connection with the Presidents themselves, having lived side by side with the First Family.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: International: Scandinavia
programme.desc: Join Pete on a treehouse vacation to the pine-forested splendor of Scandinavia. First stop: the magical TreeTop Hotel in Norway. Pete then heads to the Swedish treetops and takes a swim in a frozen lake before checking in at the renowned Treehotel.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Alaskan Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete travels to Alaska to build a mountaineering lodge in the shadow of North America's highest peak, constructing an A-Framed masterpiece for the Mt. McKinley Princess Wilderness Lodge with breathtaking views of Denali.

programme.title: Tanked!: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde get creative with a rockin' tank for a Kiss-themed mini-golf course.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Never Too Late for Love
programme.desc: Elderly chameleon, Mr. Parsons, has a romantic date with young Daphne from France. It's his last chance to father a child. They first met last year but their rendezvous didn't go well so keepers are hoping for better luck second time around.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Scarred
programme.desc: Sui, ready for more responsibility, tests herself by taking the lead in a rescue. An adopter looks for a dog that will feel at home around her many chickens and Tia rescues a pit bull with scars that reveal a painful past.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Jail Break
programme.desc: A challenge comes in the form of a stray dog stuck in the swamp, Tia takes in two sickly puppies from an overwhelmed owner, and one of Villalobos favourite residents finally finds a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Hunt Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Changing weather forces the Kilchers to venture miles from home in search of food for winter. Eivin and Eve stalk big game above the clouds. Atz Sr. and Bonnie battle the open sea. Otto, Charlotte and August faceoff for food with massive brown bears.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks
programme.desc: A couple, desperate to have a baby, hires a surrogate mother. After taking her into their home, they discover she has a dangerous obsession with the husband. They are caught in her deadly game, and have to fight for their lives and their future.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Four couples reflect on the past year of their marriages while on their annual vacation. Their holiday is interrupted when an ex-husband arrives with the intention of winning back his remarried wife.

programme.title: Martin: Credit Card Blues
programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.title: Martin: Jerome's in the House
programme.desc: Unhappy with being dumped, Pam decides to go on a date with Jerome.

programme.title: The Parkers: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: Kim's new boyfriend hopes to win the school's 'Laff Off' competition with his fat jokes.

programme.title: The Parkers: Love Is a Royal Pain
programme.desc: Nikki cons professor Oglevee into being her date for her high school class reunion.

programme.desc: Prof. Oglevee has his twin brother, Sly, take his place at a school charity auction.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Simple Plan

programme.desc: Kim's band Freestyle Unity is booked to perform at a spring-break concert in Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Parkers: Moving on Out
programme.desc: Kim moves into an apartment with Stevie to try and gain more independence from her mom.

programme.title: The Parkers: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Nikki's father holds a grudge toward Nikki for getting pregnant with Kim at an early age.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Country Cousin
programme.desc: Sasha's country relative comes to help out while Sasha is away.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Not I Barbecue
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get caught in a compromising position with two sexy intellectuals.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Not With My Cousin You Don't

programme.title: Martin: He Say, She Say
programme.desc: Cole meets a special woman with a big secret.

programme.title: Martin: Uptown Friday Night
programme.desc: After picking up Gina's earrings, Tommy, Cole and Jerome get robbed.

programme.title: Martin: Old School Loving
programme.desc: Gina gets too busy to take care of Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Cole on Ice
programme.desc: When Cole gets fired, Martin hires him.

programme.title: Martin: Housekeeper From Hell
programme.desc: Martin and Gina are afraid to terminate their tough new housekeeper.

programme.title: The Parkers: Til Death Do Us Part, And Make It Soon
programme.desc: Nikki tries to save Prof. Oglevee from Paris and copes with Kim leaving for Harvard.

programme.title: The Parkers: Squatter's Rights
programme.desc: Nikki is thrilled when Professor Oglevee must move in with her after he goes broke.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Plot With a View
programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.title: The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack
programme.desc: Kim surprises everyone when she returns home from Harvard but Nikki has rented her room.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Anniversary
programme.desc: Vera sleeps with Sasha's father, and Reggie wants Cora to stop being friends with Gordon.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet My Fair Tanya
programme.desc: Tanya gets help from Sasha on becoming a lady. The Colonel is depressed when he finds out he is the last living member of his platoon.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Stand-Up
programme.desc: Brown becomes a stand-up comedian, and uses the family's problems for jokes. The family finds out that Joanquin has an IQ higher than everyone else's.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Counseling Session
programme.desc: After a fight, Cora and Brown are counselled by the Colonel. Sasha and Will decide to take a 30 day challenge that involves them cutting out physical intimacy.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Basketball
programme.desc: Two friends confront deep changes when they both commit themselves to basketball.

programme.title: Movie: Constantine
programme.desc: This big screen adaptation of the graphic novel 'Hellblazer' revolves around John Constantine, a tortured soul who seeks redemption by banishing evil spirits from Earth. He teams up with a detective to solve her twin sister's mysterious suicide.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick
programme.desc: An ex-hit man awakens one night to find his home invaded by members of the Russian mob, who beat him, steal his car and kill his beloved dog. With the most important thing in his life taken away from him, he comes out of retirement to exact vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: John Wick is brought out of retirement again by a former associate that plans to take over a shadowy international assassin's guild. Forced by a blood oath to help, Wick heads to Rome and faces off against hordes of deadly killers and assassins.

programme.title: Harley Quinn: L.O.D.R.S.V.P
programme.desc: Harley gets a party invite from the Legion of Doom.

programme.title: Harley Quinn: A Seat at the Table
programme.desc: Harley must now spend time with Joker at the Legion of Doom.

programme.title: Harley Quinn: Bensonhurst
programme.desc: Harley heads back to her parents' house in Bensonhurst.

programme.title: Futurama: Overclockwise
programme.desc: Bender evolves into a godlike being after increasing his processing power.

programme.title: Futurama: Reincarnation
programme.desc: Futurama is reconceived in three alternate animation styles.

programme.title: Futurama: The Bots and the Bees
programme.desc: Bender and the office soda machine conceive a mini bot.

programme.title: Futurama: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: A prophet predicts 3012 will be the end of the world.

programme.title: Futurama: Decision 3012
programme.desc: Leela becomes a campaign manager for a presidential candidate whose birth certificate is missing.

programme.title: Movie: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger is sent to investigate a series of murders in a town called Helena. He finds that the preacher of the town seems to be holding his people in a fearful grip. As he gets closer to solving the murders, he places himself in mortal danger.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Person or Persons Unknown
programme.desc: After a night of heavy drinking David Gurney awakens to the frightening realization that his wife has no idea who he is. As it turns out, no one has a recollection of who David is and he's slammed in a mental institution.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: A mysterious man arrives in a Mexican village where he creates uproar among the superstitious citizens. The town doctor and a little boy are the only ones who don't see him as a threat and upset an angry mob.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People
programme.desc: Astronauts stumble upon a planet of tiny people who revere one of the men as a god.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Four O'Clock
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is the human manifestation of social conscience. He spends all his time scrutinizing various people whom he believes are evil, and claims to have the power to shrink his victims to a meagre two feet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins
programme.desc: John and Marie Holt miss the vitality of youth and want to trade in their bodies for younger ones. Upon visiting the New Life Corporation they are informed the operation costs $5000 per person, double the amount they have.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Young Man's Fancy
programme.desc: The spirit of a deceased mother tries to reclaim her little boy from his stepmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ninety Years Without Slumbering
programme.desc: A man believes that when a grandfather clock he has owned all his life stops, he will die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ring-a-Ding Girl
programme.desc: A famous actress returns to her home town when she receives a message of doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: A businessman is involved in a hit-and-run, which unfortunately leads to the death of a young bicyclist. Letting his business rival take the rap for the accident the man isn't burdened by his conscious, until his car does otherwise.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You
programme.desc: Set in a futuristic world where conformity is encouraged, and the standard enforced, an individualistic Marilyn Cuberle doesn't want to be assimilated. The problem is, she very well may not have a choice in the matter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool
programme.desc: A young pool hustler dreams of challenging 'The Best Pool Player of All Time.'

programme.title: Movie: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: A scientist travels to a small town to warn the people that a volcano could erupt and they are all in danger.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost in the Shell
programme.desc: In the near future, a cyber-enhanced human named Major is devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals. On the hunt for a new terrorist that can hack people, she discovers that her past is a lie, and she must solve the mystery of her life.

programme.title: Movie: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A military officer in a war against an alien race becomes caught in a time loop after he is killed in combat. Forced to experience the same battle over and over, he becomes more proficient with each return, and comes closer to defeating the enemy.

programme.title: Good Bones: Saddest Home on Sanders Street
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a crumbling house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood, only to find out it's the first house they can't save. With a clean slate, Mina designs a white beauty with new buyers in mind.

programme.title: Good Bones: Client Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a renovation project for an optimistic client who bought a duplex with intentions of renovating it himself.

programme.title: Good Bones: Bugging Out on Budget
programme.desc: Mina and Karen reach outside of their comfort zone with a house on the edge of the Bates Hendricks neighbourhood.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Putting Down Roots in Georgia
programme.desc: A military family that's used to moving with little notice receives his latest post orders. They hope to find a forever home in Georgia where they can settle down when he retires in six years.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Independence in Indiana
programme.desc: A couple jumps at the opportunity to move their blended family closer to kin in Indianapolis. However, they only have four weeks to move, leaving them with one weekend to find their next home.

programme.title: Celebrity I.O.U.: Behind the Surprise: Rebel Wilson's Surprise Outdoor Oasis
programme.desc: Rebel Wilson's newly married hairstylist and best friend spent all of her savings to buy a home, leaving the couple with barely any money to renovate their backyard. Rebel works with Drew and Jonathan Scott to turn her barren space into an outdoor oasis.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: First-Time Homebuyers Look to Leave Renting Behind
programme.desc: A Washington family of four has always dreamed of living near the beach, and hopes now might be their chance. Having rented on the Long Beach Peninsula for years, they are finally ready to purchase their forever home by the water.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Researching the Perfect Home in Kill Devil Hills
programme.desc: After accepting a job offer in Kill Devil Hills, North Carolina, a marine biologist looks for her dream home on the Outer Banks to share with her fiancé and his kids when they visit.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Finding a New Rhythm in Punta Cana, Dominican Republic
programme.desc: An airline worker is ready to get back to her Caribbean roots in Punta Cana, Dominican Republic and hopes to buy a two bedroom condo with a pool.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Letting Loose in St. Thomas
programme.desc: We follow families as they leave the mainland behind and head to the Caribbean to live.

programme.desc: A couple decides to make their college dream a reality and move their family of seven from Virginia to sunny Andalucia, Spain. They hope to settle down in the Almunecar region near the Mediterranean Sea in a spacious, kid-friendly villa with a pool.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life: From the Movie Industry to Sunny Spain
programme.desc: Ann and Chris have long shared a dream of living in Spain, and when it came time to take a break from their work in the movie industry, they decided to settle down to enjoy a more relaxed lifestyle on the country's Mediterranean coast.

programme.title: Island Hunters: Young Married Couple Searches for Islands in Ontario, Canada
programme.desc: Calgary residents Dave and Stephanie have been visiting Ontario's Parry Sound for years. They would like to turn one of the many islands in the area into a summer residence that can enjoy in the future.

programme.title: Island Hunters: Outdoor Enthusiasts Look for an Island Home in Ontario, Canada
programme.desc: Doctors Geoff and Catherine have enjoyed Ontario's Honey Harbour for decades. Now that they're close to retirement, they would like to make one of the Harbour's islands a permanent residence where they can raise their newly adopted children.

programme.title: Good Bones: Family Reunion Renovation

programme.title: Good Bones: Beautifying a Boring Boxy Home

programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Occult Conspiracy
programme.desc: As the Nazis waged war for world domination, they began to develop a strange mythology of occult rites and pagan beliefs, and now, experts investigate how far the Nazis may have gone to transform their party into a new, cult-like religion.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Occult Conspiracy
programme.desc: As the Nazis waged war for world domination, they began to develop a strange mythology of occult rites and pagan beliefs, and now, experts investigate how far the Nazis may have gone to transform their party into a new, cult-like religion.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Megaquake
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Killer Hornets From Hell
programme.desc: Follow a group of hunters on a seemingly impossible mission to fight off a swarm of giant hornets quickly migrating around the world. With flesh-eating venom and a piercing stinger, just one of these death machines can kill a full-grown man.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Ice Age or Hell Fire?
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, explore North America to find evidence of the most powerful geological events the Earth has ever seen Ice Ages. Finding out how they have both carved the land but also moulded the life that lives on it.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Japanese Death Match
programme.desc: Liz and Martin visit Japan, to witness the battle that rages between the people and the land they live on. But how much of a threat do Japan's volcanoes, earthquakes and tsunamis pose?

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Iceland Poison the Skies?
programme.desc: Martin and Liz explore Iceland to see if its volcanoes could spread global chaos in the future. Martin samples an insane motorsport on ashy slopes, and Liz has the dive of a lifetime between the continental plates of North America and Europe.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Can Krakatoa Stop Time?
programme.desc: An active volcano with the power to plunge the whole world into a brutal dark age is rising from the sea in the heart of the Asia. It's done it before, and it will erupt again.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: The Rockies Built the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, travel to the iconic Rocky Mountains, to reveal the extraordinary link between the Rockies' soaring peaks and the uranium that ended up in 'Little Boy', the atomic bomb detonated over the Japanese city.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Unbreakable
programme.desc: NCIS agents take viewers inside the emotional investigation into the brutal attack of Marine Corps Sergeant Jan Pawel Pietrzak and his wife, Quiana Jenkins-Pietrzak.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Alone with Evil
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death during her overnight shift at an office building.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Unbreakable
programme.desc: NCIS agents take viewers inside the emotional investigation into the brutal attack of Marine Corps Sergeant Jan Pawel Pietrzak and his wife, Quiana Jenkins-Pietrzak.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Olympic Creep
programme.desc: When Olympic gold medallist Sheila Taormina agrees to help wannabe triathlete James Ludham, she doesn't know he wants more than just coaching. His dark fantasies take over her life until she has no other choice but to face him, and her fears, head on.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Sandra never expected such extreme reprisals from Norman, a man she once called her partner. But when her daughter is caught in the crosshairs, no one can predict how far Norman will go.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: SOS SMS
programme.desc: Hardworking nurse Tara opens a chilling text from a nameless sender - someone who knows her and means her harm.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Can't Let Go
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Misty falls in love with a man nearly 15 years her senior, Misty's parents warn against the relationship. But no one could predict the danger Misty is in, or how this man will change all their lives forever.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Screams in the Desert
programme.desc: Judie starts to date an attractive, caring man called Mike but has no idea that he is utterly obsessed with her, and will stop at nothing until he has her all to himself. After years of mental torture, death threats and stalking Judie fights back.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Friend Request
programme.desc: When single mom Rosita accepts a stranger's friend request, she has no idea he's hiding a terrifying secret that will lead to a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Unlucky Seven
programme.desc: Heather, a grocery store barista, has just began dating her most recent hire, Arturo. But as time goes by, Arturo is unable to hide his dark side. His obsession with Heather comes at the expense of their relationship, his job - and her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered, her case goes unsolved for a year. A fortuitous arrest brings with it a new prime suspect, but an explosive confession of forbidden love causes everyone close to the case to reevaluate all they know.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.
